reviews.comment:
Buena atención por parte del personal que carga combustible.
Lástima que los sanitarios no los podes usar sino sos socio del ACA
y tenes que cruzar a la estación de Puma 🙄

(Translated by Google)
Good service from the staff at the gas station.
It's a shame you can't use the restrooms unless you're an ACA member, and you have to go all the way to the Puma station. 🙄
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSbWJ5TXVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pasé sólo a cargar combustible y muy buena atención y limpieza del lugar ☺️

(Translated by Google)
I only stopped by to fill up with fuel and the service and cleanliness of the place were excellent ☺️
